title: Failing to build 3.1.0
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

Trying to build podman 3.1.0 rpm from srpm on centos fails at

EOF
cd /root/rpmbuild/BUILD/podman-3.1.0/_build/src/github.com/containers/podman/vendor/k8s.io/api/apps/v1
/usr/lib/golang/pkg/tool/linux_amd64/compile -o $WORK/b717/_pkg_.a -trimpath "$WORK/b717=>" -shared -p github.com/containers/podman/vendor/k8s.io/api/apps/v1 -complete -installsuffix shared -buildid vkknGU7f2u6vvptX0xWv/vkknGU7f2u6vvptX0xWv -goversion go1.15.5 -D "" -importcfg $WORK/b717/importcfg -pack ./doc.go ./generated.pb.go ./register.go ./types.go ./types_swagger_doc_generated.go ./zz_generated.deepcopy.go
/usr/lib/golang/pkg/tool/linux_amd64/buildid -w $WORK/b717/_pkg_.a # internal
cp $WORK/b717/_pkg_.a /root/.cache/go-build/dd/dd07e76395c65aa8a7c059a2e35e9bed0934d52bd100f35f789fc57a8ad3156b-d # internal
error: Bad exit status from /var/tmp/rpm-tmp.jfHGsl (%build)


RPM build errors:
    Bad exit status from /var/tmp/rpm-tmp.jfHGsl (%build)

Any hints is appreciated.

comments.body:
I used centos 7 and tried to appropriate following SRPM with source changes to 3.1, i.e. getting appropriate source file(s) and changing spec file.
https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/CentOS_7/src/podman-3.0.1-2.el7.3.1.src.rpm

I used CentOS8, there is my steps:
```
dnf install -y gcc make wget vim git libseccomp-devel systemd-libs systemd-devel jq patch tar

export CGO_ENABLED=1

make BUILDTAGS="containers_image_openpgp systemd exclude_graphdriver_btrfs btrfs_noversion exclude_graphdriver_devicemapper selinux seccomp " podman
```
@alitvak69 the error would actually be somewhere way up in the build log. Mind posting a link to the entire buildlog please?
@alitvak69 also, if it makes life a little easier for you, we can hold the centos7 specific changes in the spec file to make builds easier for you going forward.

@alitvak69 I see this on CentOS 8 and Stream build logs: 

```
[  233s] /usr/lib/golang/pkg/tool/linux_amd64/compile -o $WORK/b577/_pkg_.a -trimpath "$WORK/b577=>" -shared -p github.com/containers/podman/pkg/trust -complete -installsuffix shared -buildid eTB0zXjrTG3w6KdRd1Tu/eTB0zXjrTG3w6KdRd1Tu -goversion go1.16.1 -D "" -importcfg $WORK/b577/importcfg -pack ./_build/src/github.com/containers/podman/pkg/trust/config.go ./_build/src/github.com/containers/podman/pkg/trust/trust.go
[  233s] # github.com/containers/podman/vendor/github.com/coreos/go-systemd/v22/sdjournal
[  233s] _build/src/github.com/containers/podman/vendor/github.com/coreos/go-systemd/v22/sdjournal/journal.go:1160:2: could not determine kind of name for C.my_sd_id128_to_string
[  233s] cgo: 
[  233s] gcc errors for preamble:
[  233s] _build/src/github.com/containers/podman/vendor/github.com/coreos/go-systemd/v22/sdjournal/journal.go:313:60: error: '_SD_ARRAY_STATIC' undeclared here (not in a function)
[  233s]  // my_sd_id128_to_string(void *f, sd_id128_t boot_id, char s[_SD_ARRAY_STATIC SD_ID128_STRING_MAX])
[  233s]                                                             ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
[  233s] _build/src/github.com/containers/podman/vendor/github.com/coreos/go-systemd/v22/sdjournal/journal.go:313:76: error: expected ']' before numeric constant
[  233s]  // my_sd_id128_to_string(void *f, sd_id128_t boot_id, char s[_SD_ARRAY_STATIC SD_ID128_STRING_MAX])
[  233s]                                                                             ^
[  233s]                                                                             ]
[  233s] 
[  233s] github.com/containers/podman/vendor/github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pkg/ns
```

I wonder if it's an old golang to blame.
@lsm5 Sorry for delay. Please keep those Centos 7 changes in spec.  After that issue can stay closed.
